release_notes:
Version 2.7.14 - Professional Identity & UX Optimization
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Core: Forced professional hardware identification (hostname sync) to prevent generic names (PC-178).
- Launcher: Optimized startup sequence to ensure the port is ready before opening the browser.
- Registry: Improved registration payload with dual-field name compatibility.
- Migration: More aggressive auto-migration for legacy device IDs.
